name: io.github.estroni/storefront
title: Estroni Storefront
description: Read-only MCP server for the Estroni storefront (https://estroni.com.au) — Australian merino & low-tox women's activewear. Exposes search_products, get_product, list_collections, and get_policies tools over Shopify's public predictive-search and product-JSON endpoints. Returns title, price (AUD), variants, availability, images, descriptions, and storefront URLs. Checkouts remain human-only by Estroni policy; end-to-end "buy-for-me" agents are not permitted.
